text_original: one of the better apps. yes, it will ask for payment for extras, but if you can keep up a good conversation, then you can go far with any character.
text_zh: 比较好的应用之一。是的，它会要求为额外功能付费，但如果你能保持良好的对话，你就能与任何角色进行深入交流。
reply_original:
Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! It is so refreshing to hear that you are enjoying the depth of the conversations. You are absolutely right—a great dialogue is the key to a truly immersive experience! 

Your support is the fuel that keeps us going.
reply_zh:
哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！听到您喜欢对话的深度，真是令人振奋。您说得完全正确——精彩的对话是打造真正沉浸式体验的关键！

您的支持是驱动我们不断前行的动力。
